findings.title: Lease 1957-57563211 past primary term — no continuous production
findings.description: Lease 1957-57563211 primary term ended 1967-11-06. No oil or gas production has been reported on any well covering this tract in the last 6 months. Habendum / continuous-production clause appears violated; the lease may be terminated automatically unless extended by clause language.
findings.suggested_action: Examine the habendum and any continuous-development / re-work clauses. If shut-in royalty provisions apply, confirm payments were made. Issue a Lease Termination Notice to operator and either renegotiate a new lease or release the leasehold.

findings.title: Probate gap — deceased lessor HANKS C W ESTATE OF (lease 1958-58563225)
findings.description: The lessor HANKS C W ESTATE OF on lease 1958-58563225 (recorded 1958-01-24) is indicated as deceased in the records. No Affidavit of Heirship, probate decree, or Record of Probate has been located in the county OPR linking heirs to this interest. The chain of title is therefore broken at this point for the undivided interest signed by this party.
findings.suggested_action: Locate heirs of HANKS C W ESTATE OF; obtain an Affidavit of Heirship and have it recorded in the county OPR. If a probate is open or closed in the appropriate jurisdiction, record a certified copy of the order. Until this is filed any conveyance from purported heirs is exposed.
findings.effort_display: 6–10 hr sr · county-clerk probate search · ~$300 rec.

findings.title: Pugh-clause acreage release missing on lease 2019-5981
findings.description: Lease 2019-5981 contains a Pugh clause requiring release of acreage not held by a producing unit after the end of the primary term (2020-03-30). No release of unproduced acreage has been recorded since term expiration.
findings.suggested_action: Prepare and record a Partial Release covering all acreage outside the producing unit. Update internal acreage records. If the operator disputes the release, request a title opinion regarding lease validity on the held acreage.

summary.headline: 37 curative items
summary.body: 37 curative items identified across 44 tracts (33 critical, 4 high). Each finding cites the specific instrument and the chain-of-title rationale; curative-effort estimates assume current East-Texas operator pricing. Findings flagged as historical should be confirmed against the recorded-release index before action — see Section V for the records expressly excluded from this examination.
